home.title: Home
home.description: Manage your pets' care simply and efficiently.
home.subTitle: Keep track of medical records, vaccinations, and vet appointments in one place.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose us?
whyChooseUs.description: At Pawfect Care, we understand that your patients' well-being and the efficiency of your work are top priorities. That's why we offer a reliable, intuitive platform designed to simplify every aspect of veterinary management.

points.1: Manage users, clients, products, services, and clinical records with ease.
points.2: Easily access medical records to improve pet care and follow-up.
points.3: An intuitive interface designed for veterinarians and pet owners, with no advanced technical skills required.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Choose the plan that best fits your needs and take your clinic's veterinary management to the next level.
